upload.title: Drop your image here
upload.subtitle: JPG · PNG · WEBP · GIF · BMP · SVG

errors.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported format. Please upload JPG, PNG, WEBP, GIF, BMP, or SVG.
errors.fileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size is 20 MB.
errors.corrupted: Could not read file. The file may be corrupted.
errors.urlFailed: Failed to load image. Check the URL or download the image and upload it directly.
errors.downsamplePromptDesc: This image is large ({width} × {height}). Downsampling is recommended for better performance.

upload.title: Upload your image
upload.desc: Drag & drop, paste with Ctrl+V, or import from a URL. Supports JPG, PNG, WEBP and more.

crop.title: Adjust the crop box
crop.desc: Drag handles to resize, drag inside to reposition. Pick a preset ratio from the left panel.

ai.title: AI face detection
ai.desc: Click 'Detect Faces' to auto-locate faces and snap the crop box around them.

export.title: Export your image
export.desc: Choose format (JPG / PNG / WEBP) and quality, then click Download to save your crop.
